title: MOOC Participants Commends American Space
description: Participate at the just concluded Massive Open Online Courses (MOOC) camp, has commended America Space in Nigeria for creating opportunities to learn  current trends in the digital marketing communica
html:
Participate at the just concluded Massive Open Online Courses (MOOC) camp, has commended America Space in Nigeria for creating opportunities to learn  current trends in the digital marketing communication and Artificial Intelligence  ecosystem.
The eight weeks intensive training which was physical and virtue, focused on getting participants started with blogging and web creation among other areas in digital marketing.
Participants were drawn from across the country, with subject experts and facilitators on ground.
American Corners serve as regional resource centers for information and programs highlighting American culture, history, current events, and government.
